Bullet Point 1: OUR BEST SELLING CHEESECRISPS: These yummy bite-sized squares are crafted from multiple layers of 100% real aged Asiago & Cheddar cheeses and fresh sourdough, seasoned with cayenne butter and baked twice for "the perfect crunch!"
Bullet Point 2: INCOMPARABLE TASTE: Created by John Macy in the mid-1980s as a bar snack for a premier New York City hotel, John Wm. Macy's CheeseCrisps are made from layers of sourdough, rich aged cheeses and hand-picked seasonings
Bullet Point 3: MAKING MEMORIES ONE CRUNCH AT A TIME: What makes these snacks so different? So crazily crunchy? So gone within minutes after filling the bowl? It's simple - real ingredients you can taste, baked twice, in classic pairings you can’t resist
Bullet Point 4: ADD A TWIST TO YOUR FAVORITE RECIPES: Whether it be a served as a snack, layered on a beautiful charcuterie board, or used as a topping for soup and salad, John Wm. Macy’s baked goods are sure to elevate your culinary collection to delicious new heights.
Bullet Point 5: 40 YEARS OF FAMILY BAKING: Good people. Great times. The perfect crunch. All three of these share one thing: they’re best enjoyed together. Putting things in great combinations has been our promise since 1976.

Item Name: Red Star Premier Blanc Wine Yeast, 5 g, (Pack of 33)
Bullet Point 1: 5 gram package (33 packs total)
Bullet Point 2: Active dry wine yeast
Bullet Point 3: Recommended for Cabernet, Cider, Dry Whites, Fruits, Meads, Port, and sodas.
Product Description: 33 Packs of Red Star Premier Blanc (formerly known as "Pasteur Champagne") Wine Yeast is a strong fermenter with high alcohol tolerance. Ferments musts and fruit juices to dryness. Good for ethanol and sulfur dioxide tolerance, this strain has a fairly neutral flavor. It's recommended for white wines and fruit juices, yet despite its former name, is not recommended for sparkling wines and champagne. Can also be useful for restarting stuck fermentations.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Budget-friendly bulk pack of a widely recognized wine yeast brand, ideal for hobbyist winemakers and small-scale fermentations. The 33-count multipack offers cost efficiency for repeated use, though the packaging lacks premium or luxury indicators. Neutral flavor and high alcohol tolerance position it as a functional, mid-tier product for dry fermentation applications rather than specialty or premium winemaking.
